name: Driftwood Path
description: A crooked trail of bleached driftwood planks, half-sunk into the sand, threads between dunes of pale grass. The fog muffles every sound to a hush. The path forks here: north toward a dark hulk looming through the mist, and east down a narrow gully toward the sound of sheltered water.
ambient_messages: A driftwood plank shifts underfoot with a hollow, waterlogged groan.
Tendrils of fog curl between the dune grass like reaching fingers.
The dunes exhale a damp, salt-rotten wind that chills you to the bone.
